title: Bare Bones: Origin Realms
description: An Add-On pack for Bare Bones, adding support for the Origin Realms Server.
body:
Bare Bones OR is a resource pack made to be an Addon of the original Bare Bones. It acts to make it so the blocks and mobs on the Origin Realms server match the original pack.

 

Requirements:

Bare Bones
Server Pack Unlocker


Other Reqs:

Json EM,
Continuity,
ETF,
CIT Resewn,
Skin Textures.

Installation:

Download Bare-Bones-OR.zip
Go to %appdata%
Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks
(You can delete the old version that you have installed)
Load Minecraft, join Origin Realms
Select the Bare-Bones-OR Texture Pack over the Server Resources
Load Bare Bones Texture Pack under Server Resources
 

Terms of Use:

 

You are allowed to alter Bare Bones OR as long as it's not distributed, please keep these to yourself.
Do not reupload any instance of the Bare Bones OR texture pack.
If you want to create addons for Bare Bones OR, make sure that no unnecessary textures exist in the addon texture pack, only then are you allowed to upload it.

 

 UNFINISHED

Any New Stuff is Often Not there Yet, I don't have early Access.
